expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。 [Width], [Height], [Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材质厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材质厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้บน, ล่าง และข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้พื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Pang-itaas, Pang-ilalim at Panig na Piraso, ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Panglikod na Piraso. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်သွားများ၏အရွယ်အစားကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width]၊ [Height]၊ [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်ဘုတ်၊ အောက်ဘုတ်နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតុល្យភាពតួអំណាន់សម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាតុល្យភាពសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្លាំងនៃសន្លឹកត្រីកោណផ្នែកខាងលើ, ផ្នែកខាងក្រោមនិងផ្នែកចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្លាំងសាច់ដុំសន្លឹកសងខាង។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດກະດານສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດຂອງວັດສະດຸເປັນແຜ່ນ, ຕ່າງໆຄືຂະໜາດວັດສະດຸ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດຂອງວັດສະດຸເຂົາສະເປສະ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth] は全体の寸法です。[BoardThick] は上板、底板、側板の材料の厚さであり、[BackBoardThick] は背景板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 판 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 판의 재료 두께를 나타내며, [BackBoardThick]는 배경판의 재료 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de los tableros superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur des matériaux des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur des matériaux de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist das Gesamtmaß, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общий размер, [BoardThick] — толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой панелей, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала для задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
